---
title: "Chapter 4: Elliptic and Parabolic Problems"
---

## Overview

This chapter focuses on numerical methods for elliptic and parabolic partial differential equations relevant to heat transfer and fluid flow.

## Learning Objectives

- Classify partial differential equations
- Discretize elliptic and parabolic PDEs
- Implement solution algorithms for heat transfer problems
- Handle boundary conditions

## Topics

### 4.1 Classification of PDEs

### 4.2 Elliptic Problems (Steady-State Heat Transfer)

### 4.3 Parabolic Problems (Transient Heat Transfer)

### 4.4 Finite Difference Discretization

### 4.5 Stability and Convergence
